summary: Iteration 212 — CAM (Criteri Ambientali Minimi) Compliance Testing. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified — CommessaHubPage shows Rintracciabilita and CAM PNRR buttons, TracciabilitaPage batch form has CAM fields section, TracciabilitaMaterialiSection shows peso_kg and percentuale_riciclato columns.

issues: Minor hydration warning in console about <tr> inside <span> - does not affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: commessa_id=com_2c57c1283871 (NF-2026-000036) with 4 material batches containing CAM data
context_for_next_testing_agent: CAM compliance features fully tested. The material_batches collection now includes CAM fields (peso_kg, percentuale_riciclato, metodo_produttivo, distanza_trasporto_km, certificazione_epd). DOP automatica creates cam_summary with materiali list, co2_risparmiata_kg, and distanza_media_km. PDF endpoints (DOP, CE Label, CAM Declaration, Rintracciabilita Totale) all return valid PDFs. Frontend shows CAM fields in batch form and displays peso/% riciclato columns in tables.

backend_endpoints.description: Creates batch with CAM fields (peso_kg, percentuale_riciclato, metodo_produttivo, distanza_trasporto_km)
Returns peso_kg and percentuale_riciclato in righe
Pulls CAM data from material_batches and calculates correctly
Creates DOP with cam_summary including materiali, co2, distanza_media
Generates multi-page professional PDF with CAM section
Generates enhanced CAM declaration with PNRR reference
Generates landscape A4 PDF with all traceability data

CAM PNRR PDF button visible and functional
TracciabilitaMaterialiSection displays peso_kg and percentuale_riciclato columns
